message:
fix(websocket): accept IANA-registered close codes 1012/1013/1014

CloseCode validation rejected codes 1012 (Service Restart), 1013
(Try Again Later), and 1014 (Bad Gateway), which are IANA-registered
and valid on the wire. Extended is_valid_code range to 1007..=1014,
added enum variants, from_u16 mappings, and regression tests.

Fixes: asupersync-1qfd0.375

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
